message:
test(core,cli): native event latency benchmark and simulation contract tests

Add benchmarks comparing native wire event decoding against legacy Lua
CLI proxy overhead, and CLI contract tests for the resize timeline JSON
artifact output mode.

benches/watcher_loop.rs (+112 lines, -5):
  - Add NativeWireBenchEvent enum with serde deserialization for
    pane_output wire events containing base64-encoded payload data
  - decode_native_pane_output(): parse JSON wire event, decode base64
    payload, return (pane_id, payload_len, timestamp)
  - spawn_noop_process(): cross-platform no-op process spawn to measure
    per-event process fork overhead (sh -c true / cmd /C exit 0)
  - simulate_lua_cli_proxy(): serialize a pane line into a JSON envelope
    and spawn a no-op process, simulating the legacy Lua→CLI dispatch
    path for latency comparison
  - bench_native_event_latency_comparison(): Criterion benchmark group
    with two functions:
    - native_decode_dispatch: in-process JSON parse + base64 decode
      (expected sub-microsecond)
    - lua_cli_proxy_sim: full process spawn overhead per event
      (expected ~1-5ms depending on platform)
  - Extend BUDGETS array with two new CI budget annotations for the
    native event benchmark group

cli_contract_tests.rs (+96 lines):
  - write_contract_simulation_scenario(): helper that writes a minimal
    deterministic YAML scenario file with resize, font_size, and
    scrollback events for the resize timeline contract
  - contract_simulate_resize_timeline_json_envelope test: runs
    ft simulate run --json --resize-timeline-json against the contract
    scenario and validates the JSON artifact envelope structure:
    mode field, expectations_passed/failed, reproducibility_key,
    timeline events array, stage_summary array (5 stages), and
    flame_samples array
  - contract_simulate_resize_timeline_requires_json_flag test: verifies
    --resize-timeline-json without --json fails with the expected
    error message

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
